title: Dwarf Weaponry
description:
EMF and ETF Required!
I made this resource pack for myself, and decided to post it in the pack, there are weapons, armor and BEEER, this pack works in conjunction with my Fresh Dwarf pack
body:
EMF and ETF Required!
I made this resource pack for myself, and decided to post it in the pack, there are weapons, armor and BEEER, this pack works in conjunction with my Fresh Dwarf pack

P.S.
To get almost all the things from the pack you need to rename them (names in the gallery)

Modded helmet from screenshot:Fabric mining helmet

Respect to:

Baruk khazâd khazâd ai-mênu!
